_comment: FAQs extracted from fruit-splash-showcase src/components/FAQ.tsx. No backend table — these can stay static on the frontend, or move to a faq table (see STRUCTURE.md).

faqs.question: How long does the juice last?
faqs.answer: Up to 4 days refrigerated. Cold-pressed and unpasteurised, so the cold chain matters — keep it chilled the whole way.

faqs.question: Do you add sugar or sweeteners?
faqs.answer: Never. The only sweetness is from the fruit itself. No syrups, no concentrates, no preservatives.

faqs.question: Do you deliver nationwide?
faqs.answer: Same-day cold delivery across Lagos. Other cities by special arrangement — message us on WhatsApp.

faqs.question: Can I refrigerate the juice?
faqs.answer: Yes, please do. Store between 2–6°C from the moment it arrives and consume within 4 days for the best taste.

contact_form._comment: Fields from src/routes/contact.tsx — no backend endpoint exists. See STRUCTURE.md (contact_message + POST /v1/public/contact).
